properties.formula: while (autopilot is engaged) (the system shall satisfy (speed < 10))
properties.text: While the autopilot is engaged, the system shall satisfy speed < 10
During takeoff, the system shall satisfy speed < 10

properties.formula: while moving (when (autopilot is engaged) (the system shall satisfy (speed < 10)))
properties.text: While moving, when the autopilot is engaged, the system shall satisfy speed < 10
